title: Israel Says It Struck Underground Bunker at Khamenei’s Compound
summary_full: The Israeli military said the facility, under the site where Iran’s supreme leader was killed by a strike last week, was still being used after the first attack.
summary_public: The Israeli military said the facility, under the site where Iran’s supreme leader was killed by a strike last week, was still being used after the first attack.
